commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Claude assistant partial-message parsing to the CLI JSONL streaming parser and extends parser tests for assistant partials, stream_event deduplication, backend filtering, and tool-use content.

PR surface: Source +50, Tests +135. Total +185 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, but not from an independent live rerun: current main ignores top-level Claude assistant JSONL records while claude-cli is configured to request partial messages, and the linked issue supplies real WebChat/TUI symptoms.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor live proof and a clean merge state before maintainer merge review; automation cannot supply the contributor's real-environment proof.

target.title: fix: relay Claude CLI assistant partial messages as streaming deltas
target.body:
## Summary

The CLI JSONL streaming parser (`createCliJsonlStreamingParser`) only recognized `stream_event` events with `content_block_delta`/`text_delta` payloads. Claude CLI with `--include-partial-messages` (always enabled for the claude-cli backend) also emits `{"type":"assistant","message":{...}}` events carrying the accumulated text. When the CLI suppresses or omits raw `stream_event` lines in favor of these partial messages, zero streaming deltas reached the gateway, leaving WebChat and TUI surfaces without any progress until the turn closed.

Adds `parseClaudeCliPartialAssistantDelta` that extracts text from `assistant` partial messages and computes the delta against the previously accumulated text. When both `stream_event` deltas and `assistant` partials arrive for the same text, the partials are naturally deduplicated because the accumulated length has already advanced.

Closes #86050

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Gateway streams zero claude-cli assistant deltas to WebChat/TUI during turns; surfaces only render the final assembled message after the turn closes.

Real environment tested: Vitest test harness exercising the actual streaming parser with real Claude CLI stream-json payloads (assistant partial messages, stream_event deltas, mixed text/tool_use content, and result events).

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-output.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-runner.spawn.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-backends.test.ts
```

Evidence after fix: 158 tests pass across the three test files. Five new tests exercise the assistant partial message path: basic delta extraction from accumulated text, incremental delta computation across multiple partials, deduplication when both stream_event and assistant events carry the same text, filtering of non-Claude backends, filtering of tool_use-only content, and text extraction from mixed text/tool_use content blocks.

Observed result after fix: The streaming parser produces onAssistantDelta callbacks for both stream_event text_delta events and assistant partial message events. The gateway relay code forwards these as chat state:delta WebSocket messages without changes.

What was not tested: Live Claude CLI subprocess interaction (requires Claude CLI binary and Anthropic API credentials not available in the test environment).
target.author: sebtardif
